package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for sql_query_constants_outside_repository_package: Raw query templates stored in handlers, services, or DTO packages instead of repository-adjacent files.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule191NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule191NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule191NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario191Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule191NegativeService, input Rule191NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
